---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Helix
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or friction — not the solution yet.

**Proposed approach**
If you have one in mind. Optional — "I don't know, but here's the problem"
is a fine issue too.

**Where does this fit?**
- [ ] Core collaboration (conversations, fork/branch, presence, prompt library)
- [ ] Deep Reasoning / Ouroboros
- [ ] File grounding / knowledge base
- [ ] Provider / model support
- [ ] Infra, deployment, self-hosting
- [ ] Something else

**Anything else**
Links, prior art, related issues.

---
Note: if this touches an interface documented in `AI-LANE-CONTRACTS.md`
(event kinds, endpoints), please say so — those are treated as frozen
contracts and changes there need more discussion before code.
